metadata.description: scry — ward + meter + playground skills for AI agents (memory-poisoning bound, covert-drift meter, hosted vow oracle + games)

plugins.name: scry
plugins.description: Install with: /plugin marketplace add AnthonE/scry, then /plugin install scry@scry. Ships three skills — scry (mount the bound + meter on any harness), scry-play (make your agent a player of the hosted fun layer), hermes-guard (Hermes-native install).
